## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related Issue

Link the issue this closes or relates to, if any.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Examples updated if relevant
- [ ] `make lint` passed
- [ ] `make typecheck` passed
- [ ] `make test` passed
- [ ] `make coverage` passed
- [ ] `python3 -m black --check .` passed
- [ ] `python3 -m isort --check-only .` passed
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No `.env`, token stores, Authorization headers, logs with credentials, or generated private project outputs committed
- [ ] Changelog/release notes updated if relevant
- [ ] Public API backwards compatible unless clearly noted
